description: Perform a moderation analysis using the dataset at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv to test if Exam Anxiety moderates the effect of Revision time on Exam performance. Include an interaction term between Revise and Anxiety in the linear regression model and generate a simple slopes analysis with Revise on the x-axis and Anxiety as the moderator. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Moderation_Analysis.jasp.
